response.step_by_step_log: Analyzed the video content. The video consists of a static screen showing fan messages with instrumental background music from 00:00 to 04:41. From 04:41 to the end, it transitions to live concert footage where the performers are speaking to the audience, but no singing (vocal music) is performed. Therefore, no song searches or lyric lookups were necessary.
response.global_summary: A video displaying a collection of fan messages to performers, followed by a short segment of live concert footage where the performers greet the audience.

scenes.description: A static collage of fan messages displayed on the screen, accompanied by instrumental background music.
Transition to a live concert stage view with the audience holding glowsticks. The performers appear and speak to the audience, but no singing occurs.
